prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Pipe bedding & backfill, part of the Sitework & Utilities scope. The observed field condition is: lifts too thick for compactor. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: project specs, IPC 306. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Pipe bedding & backfill (residential job)
